_meta.name: Phoenix Omega — Qwen-Image FP8 (V3 face engine, no-PuLID variant)
_meta.description: Qwen-Image-2.0 FP8 + Qwen 2.5-VL text encoder + Qwen VAE. Pure text-mode (no PuLID face-lock). Used as V3 ship-fallback when PuLID's EVA-CLIP download is blocked. Identity comes from the 12-axis character_design YAML tokens (per docs/CHARACTER_INDIVIDUATION_PIPELINE_SPEC_2026-05-02.md §2.3) rather than reference-image face-lock. Faces may drift across panels but every other V3 axis (composition templates, archetypes, palette discipline, scene rewrites) is the V3 quality upgrade. PuLID becomes V3.1 follow-up.
_meta.fallback_reason: EVA-CLIP download (~5 GB) hung in PuLID's hf_hub_download single-connection path; pivoted to text-only Qwen to unblock V3 ship

inputs.text: {{negative_prompt}}, text, words, letters, captions, watermark, signature, signs, writing, typography, font, lettering, logos, subtitles, calligraphy, chinese characters, japanese characters, kanji, hiragana, katakana, hangul
